name: maria-art-portfolio
description: Maria's Art Portfolio with Poetry Management

scripts.check:syntax: node --check script.js && node --check admin.js && node --check data-api.js && node --check portfolio.js && node --check instagram-fixtures.js && node --input-type=module --check < cloudflare-worker.js && node --input-type=module --check < _worker.js && node --check storage/ax42-image-storage.mjs && node --check scripts/readiness-check.mjs && node --check scripts/launch-report.mjs && node --check scripts/cloudflare-status-check.mjs && node --check scripts/deploy-preflight.mjs && node --check scripts/local-runtime-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/morning-status.mjs && node --check scripts/morning-handoff.mjs && node --check scripts/morning-proof.mjs && node --check scripts/instagram-agent.mjs && node --check scripts/capture-visuals.mjs && node --check scripts/seed-local-shop.mjs && node --check scripts/simulate-instagram-sync.mjs && node --check scripts/worker-behavior.test.mjs
scripts.mobile:android:debug: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.mobile:android:verify:fresh: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && ./gradlew tasks --all
scripts.verify:launch-local: npm run check:syntax && npm run test:worker && npm run build && npm run deploy:preflight -- --target all --package-only && npm run verify:runtime-local && npm run launch:report
scripts.verify:local: npm run check:syntax && npm run test:worker && npm run build && npx wrangler deploy --dry-run && npm run mobile:android:verify
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run deploy:preflight -- --target worker && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && npm run deploy:preflight -- --target pages && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name "$CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_PROJECT"
scripts.deploy: npm run verify:local && npm run deploy:preflight -- --target all && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:pages

author: Maria
